invited.title: You're invited to a hospi event!

notChosen.title: Application update
notChosen.body: The room {roomTitle} has been filled. Good luck with your search!

login.title: Log in
login.description: Log in with your university account to access OpenHospi.
login.inacademiaDescription: Verify your student status via your educational institution.
login.devGithubDescription: Development only. Uses GitHub for local testing.

errors.USER_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists
errors.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Your email address has not been verified yet
errors.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ALREADY_LINKED: This social account is already linked
errors.CREDENTIAL_ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND: No account found with these credentials

discover.title: Discover rooms
discover.roomCount: {count, plural, =0 {No rooms found} =1 {1 room} other {# rooms}}
discover.empty: No rooms match your filters. Try adjusting your search.

onboarding.title: Complete your profile

stepDescriptions.step1: Enter your name and email address.
stepDescriptions.step2: Tell us a bit about yourself.
stepDescriptions.step3: Write a short introduction so houses get to know you. You can skip this and fill it in later.
stepDescriptions.step6: Add photos so houses get to know you.

identity.emailHint: We'll send a verification code to this address.
identity.verificationSent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
identity.codeStepDescription: Enter the code we sent to your email before continuing.
identity.codeExpired: This code expired. Request a new one.
identity.emailMismatch: This code is for a different email address.

onboarding.genderPreferNotToSayHint: You will only see rooms that are open to everyone. Rooms looking specifically for a man or a woman won't appear in your results.

security.e2ee_description: OpenHospi encrypts all your chats end-to-end. Only you and the other person can read messages.
security.pin_hint: This PIN protects your encryption key. You'll need it to recover your chats on a new device.
security.setup_error: Could not set up encryption. Please try again.
security.recovery_description: Enter the PIN you chose during onboarding to restore your encryption keys.
security.recovery_error: Could not recover keys. Is your PIN correct?
security.start_fresh_warning: Starting fresh will generate new encryption keys. You will lose access to old chat messages.
security.no_backup: No backup found. Set up new encryption keys.

rooms.title: My Rooms
rooms.empty: You haven't listed any rooms yet.

applicants.title: Applicants
applicants.empty: No applications yet. Share your room to attract applicants.
applicants.acceptConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to accept {name}? This action cannot be undone.
applicants.notesPlaceholder: Add optional notes about this applicant...
applicants.selectApplicant: Select an applicant to view their profile

houseSetup.title: Set up your property first
houseSetup.description: Before you can list a room, you need to create a house. A house groups your rooms together and lets you invite housemates.

rooms.title: Group your rooms
rooms.description: Organise all rooms under one house for a clear overview.

housemates.title: Invite housemates
housemates.description: Add current housemates so they can help review applicants.

form.title: Create your house
form.description: Give your house a recognisable name — you can change it later.

errors.INVALID_NAME: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please try again later.

housePicker.title: Which house is this room in?
housePicker.description: Select the house where this room is located.
housePicker.roomCount: {count, plural, =0 {No rooms yet} =1 {1 room} other {# rooms}}

stepDescriptions.step1: Give your room a title and location.
stepDescriptions.step2: Add pricing, availability, and room details.
stepDescriptions.step3: Set preferences and features for your room.
stepDescriptions.step4: Upload photos to show your room.

sectionDescriptions.features: Highlight what makes your room and location special.
sectionDescriptions.preferences: Describe who you're looking for as a new housemate.
sectionDescriptions.association: Optionally link this room to a student association.

helpers.title: A catchy title helps your room stand out.
helpers.description: Describe what makes this room and house special.

wizard.photoGuidance: Upload at least 1 photo to publish. The first photo is your cover.

fields.title: Title
fields.availableUntilHint: Required for sublet and temporary rentals

placeholders.title: e.g. Cozy room in student house

validation.availableUntilRequired: An end date is required for sublet and temporary rentals

shareLink.title: Share link
shareLink.regenerateConfirm: This will invalidate the old link. Continue?

status.confirmClose: Are you sure you want to close this listing? This cannot be undone.
status.publishError: Upload at least 1 photo before publishing.
status.RATE_LIMITED: Too many rooms created today. Please try again later.
status.confirmDelete: This will permanently delete this draft room.

events.title: Hospi Events
events.empty: No events yet. Create one to invite applicants.
events.cancelConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to cancel this event? All invitees will be notified.
events.hospiEnded: This hospi has ended. Ready to decide?

voting.title: Voting
voting.description: Rank applicants by preference. All housemates can see each other's votes.
voting.noApplicants: No applicants available for voting yet. Applicants need to be invited and attend an event first.
voting.sectionDescription: Rank applicants together and view each other's votes transparently.

closeRoom.title: Close listing
closeRoom.description: Choose a new housemate or close the listing without selecting anyone. All applicants will be notified.
closeRoom.chooseHint: Click to select an applicant, or close without choosing anyone.
closeRoom.noApplicants: No active applicants. The listing will simply be closed.
closeRoom.confirmWithChoice: The selected applicant will be notified as accepted. All others will be notified as not chosen. This cannot be undone.
closeRoom.confirmWithoutChoice: All applicants will be notified as not chosen. This cannot be undone.

roomDetail.approximateLocation: Approximate location — exact address shared after application

roomDetail.loginToApply: Log in with InAcademia to apply

errors.invalid_data: Please check your message and try again.
errors.room_not_active: This room is no longer accepting applications.
errors.is_housemate: You are already a housemate of this room.
errors.already_applied: You have already applied to this room.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.bio_required: Please add a bio to your profile before applying. This helps housemates get to know you.

privacyAccept.title: Privacy policy updated
privacyAccept.description: We have updated our privacy policy. Please review the changes and accept to continue using OpenHospi.
privacyAccept.summary: The updated privacy policy covers how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in compliance with the AVG/GDPR.

restricted.banner: Your account processing is restricted. Some features are unavailable. You can manage this in Settings > Privacy.

consent.title: We use cookies
consent.description: We use essential cookies to keep you logged in and optional cookies for a better experience. You can manage your preferences at any time.
consent.manageDescription: Choose which cookies you allow. Essential cookies are always active.

essential.name: Essential
essential.description: Required for authentication and core platform functionality. Cannot be disabled.

functional.name: Functional
functional.description: Remembers your preferences like language and sidebar state.

push_notifications.name: Push notifications
push_notifications.description: Allows delivery of browser push notifications for messages and events.

analytics.name: Analytics
analytics.description: Cookieless analytics by Vercel to help us improve the platform. No personal data is collected.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your preferences, privacy, and account settings.

pushNotifications.title: Push notifications
pushNotifications.description: Manage browser push notifications to stay updated on new messages, applications, and events.

calendar.title: Calendar subscription
calendar.description: Subscribe to your hospi events calendar. Calendar apps will automatically receive updates when events change.
calendar.warning: Anyone with this link can see your hospi events. If you suspect it has been compromised, regenerate it.

settings.exportRateLimited: Too many export requests today. Please try again later.

dataExport.title: Export your data
dataExport.description: Download all your personal data in JSON or CSV format. This includes your profile, rooms, applications, messages, and consent records.

consentManagement.title: Consent management
consentManagement.description: Manage your cookie and data processing preferences.

dataOverview.title: Your data overview
dataOverview.description: See what personal data is stored and how it is used.

consentHistory.title: Consent history
consentHistory.description: View the history of your consent changes.

dataRequest.title: Data requests
dataRequest.description: Submit a formal GDPR request regarding your personal data.
dataRequest.success: Request submitted successfully. We will respond within 30 days.

processingRestriction.title: Restrict processing
processingRestriction.description: Temporarily pause all processing of your data. Your profile and rooms will be hidden from other users. You can lift this restriction at any time.
processingRestriction.reasonPlaceholder: Why do you want to restrict processing?
processingRestriction.activateSuccess: Processing restricted. Your profile and rooms are now hidden.
processingRestriction.liftSuccess: Processing restriction lifted. Your profile and rooms are visible again.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: View and manage your active login sessions.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
dangerZone.confirmDescription: This will permanently delete your account, profile, rooms, applications, and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

chat.title: Chat
chat.empty: No conversations yet. Conversations are created when you're invited to a hospi.
chat.selectConversation: Select a conversation to start messaging
chat.key_reset_message: Message from before key reset — cannot be decrypted

safety_number.title: Safety number
safety_number.description: Compare this number with {name} to verify your conversation is end-to-end encrypted.
safety_number.instructions: If this number matches on both devices, your conversation is secure. Meet in person or use a trusted channel to compare.
safety_number.unavailable: Safety number unavailable. Both users must have encryption set up.
safety_number.scan_instructions: Point your camera at the other person's QR code
safety_number.verified_description: Your safety numbers match. This conversation is secure.
safety_number.mismatch_description: Safety numbers do not match. This connection may not be secure.
safety_number.key_changed_description: {name}'s security key has changed. Tap to re-verify.
safety_number.camera_permission: Camera access is needed to scan QR codes
safety_number.camera_permission_settings: Enable camera access in Settings to scan QR codes.
safety_number.invalid_qr: This QR code is not a valid OpenHospi safety number
safety_number.scan_own_qr: You scanned your own QR code

encryption.reset_error: Could not reset encryption keys. Please try again.
encryption.setup_description: Protect your messages with a PIN.

eventInvitation.subject: You're invited to a hospi event: {eventTitle}
eventInvitation.heading: You're invited!
eventInvitation.body: You've been invited to the hospi event "{eventTitle}" for the room "{roomTitle}".

eventReminder.subject: Reminder: {eventTitle} is coming up
eventReminder.heading: Event reminder
eventReminder.body: Just a reminder that "{eventTitle}" starts at {time}.

eventCancelled.subject: Event cancelled: {eventTitle}
eventCancelled.heading: Event cancelled
eventCancelled.body: The hospi event "{eventTitle}" has been cancelled by the organiser.

applicationAccepted.subject: Congratulations! Your application for "{roomTitle}" was accepted
applicationAccepted.heading: Application accepted!
applicationAccepted.body: Great news — you've been chosen for the room "{roomTitle}". The room owner will be in touch with next steps.

applicationNotChosen.subject: Update on your application for "{roomTitle}"
applicationNotChosen.heading: Application update
applicationNotChosen.body: Unfortunately, the room "{roomTitle}" has been filled. Don't give up — there are plenty of other rooms available!

userBanned.subject: Your OpenHospi account has been suspended
userBanned.heading: Account suspended
userBanned.body: Your account has been suspended for the following reason: {reason}.
userBanned.contact: If you believe this is a mistake, please contact us at support@openhospi.nl.

listingRemoved.subject: Your listing has been removed
listingRemoved.heading: Listing removed
listingRemoved.body: Your listing has been removed for the following reason: {reason}.
listingRemoved.contact: If you believe this is a mistake, please contact us at support@openhospi.nl.
